mnemonics: Think Long-Term Like a Telescope: Look far ahead to see the big trends, not just the immediate stars (short-term needs).
keyPoints: Focus on forecasting demand 3-5 years into the future.
Analyze industry trends, business growth plans, and technological advancements.
Plan for scalable and flexible infrastructure to accommodate unforeseen growth.
commonMistakes: Only planning for current or short-term (1-2 year) needs, leading to costly reactive upgrades.
Ignoring the impact of emerging technologies (e.g., AI, quantum computing) on future resource requirements.
